chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-2371 of 2022 _______________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) For order as to maintainability of petition 13.08.2025 --------- This is an old petition of 2022, which is over 03 years ago. On the last date of hearing i.e. 18.02.2025, learned counsel for the petitioners was completely unprepared and sought time to prepare his brief. He has yet to satisfy the Court regarding maintainability of the petition. Today, none present for the petitioners without intimation and the question of maintainability still remains outstanding. It appears that the petitioners have lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution. Head of Const. Benches Judge Nadir*
